instant_access_desc: Get instant access to over 5,000 premium files, audiobooks, and courses. Enjoy unrestricted access to 800+ master classes and webinars.
accept_terms_notice: Please accept terms and conditions to proceed.
ssl_connection_notice: This is a 256-Bit Secured SSL Connection
pricing_load_failed: Failed to load pricing. Please refresh the page.
footer_trial_text: By activating the TRIAL, you will subscribe to the vip.cosmopredict.com service for a 3-day trial period at the promotional price indicated in the offer. A charge of 20 MAD will be made to your card for verification purposes. After the 3-day trial period, unless you cancel your subscription, your account will automatically be upgraded to a Full Access Membership, and you will be charged 679 MAD every 14-day. All details and conditions related to the subscription can be found in our Terms and Conditions.
